name: Standing Turn With Bag
prompt_fragment: The model performs a small standing turn to present the handbag silhouette.
product_interaction: bag faces camera during the turn and remains unobstructed
composition_space_hint: clear space beside the model's right hip for later handbag placement
occlusion_hint: right hand visible with relaxed fingers and no object currently held
hero_action_prompt_fragment: adult editorial model standing in a gentle turn with empty hands visible, right hand relaxed beside the right hip, clean side silhouette, no object held
hero_pose_intent: simple turn pose with visible relaxed right hand for later product placement

notes: Manual anchor for standing turn comparison action.
Places handbag near the right hand/right hip region.
